title: Metro Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Metro Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
